description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with the docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay. Add a before_script that runs `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p "$CI_BUILD_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY"` for all jobs. Define a single deploy stage containing three jobs: development, stable, and testing. The development job runs only on the master branch, executes `docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" .` then `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest"`, and is in the deploy stage. The stable job runs only on tags, runs `docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}" .` and `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}"`; the testing job runs on all branches except master (and only on branches), and runs the same build and push commands with the ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} tag.
